name: hk-funeral-suite
description: A WordPress plugin for funeral home websites — custom post types, taxonomies, and Gutenberg blocks for staff, caskets, urns, monuments, keepsakes, and pricing packages.
author: HumanKind

scripts.build: npm run build:scripts && npm run build:blocks
scripts.start: npm run start:scripts & npm run start:blocks
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
